title: CGS Hosts Golf Tournament for Special Olympics
summary: CGS’ Chesapeake office raised $16,757.00 directly supporting local Virginia Special Olympic athletes! On October 21, 2022, Chugach Government Solutions’ Division III Chesapeake office hosted their 17th Annual Golf Tournament in support of the Special Olympics at Heron Ridge Golf Club.
